tasks.subject: Task 0: Workspace deps + SAFETY scaffolding
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add rusqlite/refinery/humantime workspace deps; create empty sqlite + query modules in safessh-audit with SAFETY-INVARIANT-4 markers.

**Files:**
- Modify: Cargo.toml (workspace)
- Modify: crates/safessh-audit/Cargo.toml
- Modify: crates/safessh-audit/src/lib.rs
- Create: crates/safessh-audit/src/sqlite/mod.rs
- Create: crates/safessh-audit/src/sqlite/migrations/V1__initial.sql
- Create: crates/safessh-audit/src/query.rs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- cargo build --workspace succeeds
- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings clean
- safessh-audit exports pub mod sqlite + pub mod query
- Both new files have // SAFETY-INVARIANT-4 doc comment

**Verify:** `cargo build --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Cargo.toml", "crates/safessh-audit/Cargo.toml", "crates/safessh-audit/src/lib.rs", "crates/safessh-audit/src/sqlite/mod.rs", "crates/safessh-audit/src/query.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings", "acceptanceCriteria": ["build succeeds", "clippy clean", "modules exported", "SAFETY markers present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: SQLite schema + Index::open_or_create + corruption recovery
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define V1 migration (events + meta + indexes); Index::open_or_create with schema_version validation, source_file change reset, and SQLITE_CORRUPT recovery via delete + rebuild.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/safessh-audit/src/sqlite/migrations/V1__initial.sql
- Modify: crates/safessh-audit/src/sqlite/mod.rs
- Modify: crates/safessh-storage/src/paths.rs (audit_db method)
- Modify: crates/safessh-core/src/error.rs (AuditIndexNewer + AuditIndexFailed variants)
- Create: crates/safessh-audit/tests/sqlite_index.rs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- First open creates audit.db with meta.schema_version=1, last_indexed_offset=0, source_file=<log path>
- Second open is idempotent
- schema_version > 1 returns Error::AuditIndexNewer
- Truncated DB recovers via delete + rebuild

**Verify:** `cargo test -p safessh-audit --test sqlite_index`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-audit/src/sqlite/mod.rs", "crates/safessh-audit/src/sqlite/migrations/V1__initial.sql", "crates/safessh-audit/tests/sqlite_index.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/src/paths.rs", "crates/safessh-core/src/error.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p safessh-audit --test sqlite_index", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 tests pass", "newer schema returns typed error", "corruption recovery works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Catch-up loop indexes JSONL into SQLite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Index::catch_up reads from last_indexed_offset to EOF, parses each line, extracts columns per spec §3.2.3, INSERTs in single transaction, advances offset; resets to 0 when file shrank.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/safessh-audit/src/sqlite/mod.rs
- Modify: crates/safessh-audit/tests/sqlite_index.rs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 100 events → 100 rows; offset = file length
- target/decision/exit_code extracted from data.* paths
- Bad JSON lines skipped; offset still advances
- Log shrink → reset offset to 0, reindex new file
- 10k events catch-up < 5s

**Verify:** `cargo test -p safessh-audit --test sqlite_index`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-audit/src/sqlite/mod.rs", "crates/safessh-audit/tests/sqlite_index.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p safessh-audit --test sqlite_index", "acceptanceCriteria": ["catch-up indexes events", "rotation handled", "parse errors don't block", "10k under 5s"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Filter struct + query API
tasks.description:
**Goal:** query::Filters and query() build SQL from AND-combined filters; ORDER BY timestamp DESC; default limit 100, 0 = unlimited; calls catch_up first (lazy contract).

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/safessh-audit/src/query.rs
- Create: crates/safessh-audit/tests/query.rs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- All filter dimensions tested (project, event_type, target, decision, exit_code, since, until, grep, limit)
- timestamp DESC ordering
- limit=0 means unlimited
- grep is substring match against raw_json

**Verify:** `cargo test -p safessh-audit --test query`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-audit/src/query.rs", "crates/safessh-audit/tests/query.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p safessh-audit --test query", "acceptanceCriteria": ["8 filter tests pass", "ordering verified", "lazy catch-up integrated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Property test query equivalence with brute-force scan
tasks.description:
**Goal:** proptest verifying that for any random sequence of valid AuditEvent JSON, query() returns the same set as a brute-force JSONL scan.

**Files:**
- Modify: Cargo.toml + crates/safessh-audit/Cargo.toml (proptest dep)
- Create: crates/safessh-audit/tests/query_proptest.rs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 64+ proptest cases pass
- Equivalence verified across project filter

**Verify:** `cargo test -p safessh-audit --test query_proptest`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-audit/tests/query_proptest.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p safessh-audit --test query_proptest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["proptest passes 64 cases"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Additive data.target field on exec events
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend exec_attempt + exec_complete signatures with optional target arg (Option<&str>); thread resolved target name through exec.rs call sites; data.target absent when None.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/safessh-audit/src/event.rs
- Modify: crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/exec.rs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- data.target appears in exec event JSON when target is known
- decide_and_record receives target_name parameter
- All audit + cli tests pass

**Verify:** `cargo test -p safessh-audit && cargo test -p safessh-cli`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-audit/src/event.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/exec.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p safessh-audit && cargo test -p safessh-cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["target field emitted", "all tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: CLI flags + filter parsing for audit query
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend AuditCmd::Query with all new flags; parsers for duration/RFC3339 and N..M ranges; bad input → exit 30.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/safessh-cli/src/cli.rs
- Modify: crates/safessh-cli/src/main.rs
- Modify: crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/audit.rs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- All new flags parsed (--since, --until, --limit, --decision, --exit-code, --target, --format)
- Duration like "7d" / "24h" parsed; RFC3339 parsed; bad input → Error::Usage
- exit-code N or N..M parsed; lo > hi rejected
- since > until rejected

**Verify:** `cargo test -p safessh-cli audit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/cli.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/main.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/audit.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p safessh-cli audit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5 unit tests pass", "--help shows all new flags"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: SQLite-backed audit query body + log-scan fallback
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire audit::run to call Index::open_or_create + query(); format results per --format (jsonl/table/count); on SQLite failure print stderr warning and fall back to JSONL line scan.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/audit.rs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- No-flag query prints all events as JSONL, newest first, capped at 100
- --format count prints just N
- --format table prints fixed-width columns
- SQLite failure → stderr warning + log-scan fallback
- Missing log → 0 results, exit 0

**Verify:** Manual e2e in tempdir SAFESSH_HOME with all three formats

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/audit.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build --workspace && cargo test -p safessh-cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all formats work", "fallback path runs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: TUI audit screen — SQLite-backed query + new filters
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace audit screen ring buffer with windowed SQL query; on FsEvent::AuditAppended re-run catch_up + query; add since/until/decision/exit_code/target filter fields; show "n shown / N total"; fall back to JSONL tail when SQLite unavailable.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/audit.rs
- Modify: crates/safessh-tui/Cargo.toml (add safessh-audit dep)
- Modify: crates/safessh-tui/tests (snapshot test)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 500-event fixture renders without 200-event cap
- Filter edits trigger requery
- Live tail still picks up new events
- Fallback to JSONL when audit.db missing

**Verify:** `cargo test -p safessh-tui` + manual TUI smoke

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/audit.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p safessh-tui", "acceptanceCriteria": ["new snapshot passes", "filter wiring works", "fallback mode works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: docs/audit.md schema reference + recipes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Author docs/audit.md covering JSONL schema (per event type), SQLite schema (DDL), audit query examples covering all flags, recovery recipes.

**Files:**
- Create: docs/audit.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- V1 SQLite DDL included

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/audit.md"], "verifyCommand": "ls docs/audit.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["covers all event types", "covers all flags", "recovery documented"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Section helper refactor (sections.rs)
tasks.description:


tasks.subject: Task 15: CLI parse_target + --target all matrix
tasks.description:
**Goal:** parse_target accepts all 6 names; --target all walks the supported (target, scope) matrix from spec §4.3, skipping unsupported pairs with stderr note; reject --target plain unless --scope path.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/skill.rs
- Modify: crates/safessh-cli/src/cli.rs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- parse_target accepts claude-code, agents-md, cursor, gemini-cli, codex, plain, all
- --target all --scope user installs claude-code(user), gemini-cli(user), codex(user)
- --target all --scope project installs claude-code, agents-md, cursor, gemini-cli (all project)
- --target plain without --scope path → usage error

**Verify:** Manual e2e

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/skill.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/cli.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p safessh-cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["matrix walks correctly", "plain rejection works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 16: safessh skill update
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Update subcommand. Walks (target,scope) matrix; rewrites only existing files (or sections); --dry-run prints unified diff (similar crate); --target repeatable; --scope user|project|both default both.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/safessh-cli/src/cli.rs (UpdateScope, DetectFormat enums)
- Modify: crates/safessh-cli/src/main.rs
- Modify: crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/skill.rs
- Create: crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/skill_helper.rs
- Modify: crates/safessh-skill/src/sections.rs (export preview_strip)
- Modify: workspace + cli Cargo.toml (similar dep)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Only existing files rewritten; non-installed paths skipped
- --dry-run prints unified diff per outdated file
- --target/--scope filters work
- Exit 0 even with zero updates; stderr note when none found

**Verify:** Manual e2e

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/skill.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/skill_helper.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["update only touches existing files", "dry-run shows diff"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 22: Merge to develop, then main; tag both releases
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Merge feature/v0.5-v0.6 → develop (PR), then develop → main; push two tags v0.5.0 and v0.6.0 so cargo-dist produces two GitHub releases. Back-merge main → develop.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- PR opened/merged feature/v0.5-v0.6 → develop
- develop → main merge complete
- Tags v0.5.0 and v0.6.0 pushed
- Back-merge main → develop

**Verify:** `git tag --list 'v0.[56].*'` lists both

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "git tag --list 'v0.[56].*'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["both tags pushed", "develop back-merged"]}
```
